data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Core reported gap RESOLVED (3 alarms deployed + verified live; the SNS subscription resource was recreated by the apply). Residual items — confirming the pending SNS email (a human inbox action I cannot perform) and adding terraform drift CI (a standalone OIDC infra project) — are spun to follow-up task c7d4-c020-748f-4951. Closing unsigned by design.". Session: c005f242b.
